content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help!

options.text: You're welcome! Have a great day!
I'm sorry, I didn't mean to bother you.
Can you help me again tomorrow?
That's okay, I'll figure it out myself.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You're welcome! Have a great day!' 是对道谢的标准礼貌回应，同时自然结束对话。干扰项1是道歉，不符合语境；干扰项2是请求再次帮助，与结束对话冲突；干扰项3是拒绝帮助，显得冷漠不礼貌。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you showing me around!

options.text: No worries! Take care and enjoy the rest of your trip!
Yeah, it was kind of boring actually.
Do you have any more questions?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No worries! Take care and enjoy the rest of your trip!' 礼貌回应并表达祝福，符合道别场景。干扰项1贬低帮助行为，不礼貌；干扰项2继续提问，未结束对话；干扰项3过度谦虚，削弱了感谢的积极意义。

options.text: It was my pleasure! Safe travels!
I'm busy now, can we talk later?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'It was my pleasure! Safe travels!' 是正式而温暖的回应，适合强烈感谢的语境。干扰项1是回应感谢但未结束对话；干扰项2是拒绝沟通，不礼貌；干扰项3是敷衍回应，缺乏诚意。

content.hint: 回应感谢的标准开场语
content.knowledgePoint: 回��感谢的固定表达（You're welcome）

content.template: I really appreciate it. ___ and have a wonderful day!
content.hint: 道别时常用的温馨表达，常与 'have a wonderful day' 连用
content.knowledgePoint: 道别常用搭配（Take care + 祝福语）

content.template: Thank you so much! ___ you for everything!
content.hint: 句首重复感谢词以加强语气，口语中常见
content.knowledgePoint: 感谢表达的重复强调用法（Thanks for...）

content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help!
expectedAnswers: You're welcome! Have a great day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应了感谢并自然结束对话
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，无中式英语
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'welcome', 'enjoy', 'safe travels' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you helping me find the museum!
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你帮我找到博物馆！
expectedAnswers: You're so welcome! Hope you love the exhibits!
Happy to help! Have a fantastic time exploring!
Anytime! Don't forget to take lots of photos!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确回应了具体帮助并表达祝福
语言准确性：动词搭配和时态是否正确（如 'happy to help'）
表达自然度：是否使用了地道的口语表达（如 'don't forget to...'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'help', 'enjoy', 'explore', 'fantastic' 等场景词汇

content.speakerText: Thank you for everything—you made my trip unforgettable!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你做的一切，你让我的旅行难以忘怀！
expectedAnswers: That means so much to me! Wishing you safe travels home!
I'm so glad I could help! Take care and come back soon!
You're very welcome! I hope you keep wonderful memories!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了强烈感谢并给予情感回馈
语言准确性：是否使用了高级表达（如 'means so much', 'wishing you'）
表达自然度：语气是否真诚、温暖，符合情感交流场景
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'unforgettable', 'safe travels', 'memories', 'come back' 等情感关键词
